sectiondef.header: Copying and filling batches of matrices

briefdescription.para: B = A.

memberdef.argsstring: (Structured< VA, S > A, Structured< VB, S > B, Opts... opts)
memberdef.name: copy

briefdescription.para: B = A.
B = a.

memberdef.argsstring: (simdified_value_t< VB > a, Structured< VB, S > B)
memberdef.name: fill

briefdescription.para: B = a.
Multiply a vector by a scalar z = αx.
Multiply a vector by a scalar x = αx.
Compute the Hadamard (elementwise) product of two vectors z = x ⊙ y.
Compute the Hadamard (elementwise) product of two vectors x = x ⊙ y.
Elementwise clamping z = max(lo, min(x, hi)).
Elementwise clamping residual z = x - max(lo, min(x, hi)).

memberdef.argsstring: (Vx &&x, simdified_simd_t< Vx > lo, simdified_simd_t< Vx > hi, Vz &&z)
memberdef.name: clamp

briefdescription.para: Elementwise clamping z = max(lo, min(x, hi)), with scalar lo and hi.

memberdef.argsstring: (Ta alpha, Vx &&x, Tb beta, Vy &&y, Vz &&z)
memberdef.name: axpby

briefdescription.para: Add scaled vector z = αx + βy.
Add scaled vector y = αx + βy.

memberdef.argsstring: (Vy &&y, const std::array< simdified_simd_t< Vy >, sizeof...(Vx)> &alphas, Vx &&...x)
memberdef.name: axpy

briefdescription.para: Add scaled vector y = ∑ᵢ αᵢxᵢ + βy.
Add scaled vector z = αx + y.
Add scaled vector y = αx + βy (where β is a compile-time constant).
Negate a matrix or vector B = -A.
Negate a matrix or vector A = -A.
Subtract two matrices or vectors C = A - B. Rotate affects B.
Subtract two matrices or vectors A = A - B. Rotate affects B.
Add two matrices or vectors C = A + B. Rotate affects B.
Add two matrices or vectors A = A + B. Rotate affects B.
Apply a function to all elements of the given matrices or vectors.
Apply a function to all elements of the given matrices or vectors, storing the result in the first argument.
Apply a function to all elements of the given matrices or vectors, storing the results in the first two arguments.
Apply a function to all elements of the given matrices or vectors, storing the results in the tuple of matrices given as the first argument.
Apply a function to all elements of the given vectors and the diagonal elements of the given square matrices, storing the results in the tuple of vectors or matrices given as the first argument.

detaileddescription.para: Most efficient if only the first argument contains matrices, and all other arguments are column vectors.

briefdescription.para: Copy the diagonal elements of a matrix.

detaileddescription.para: The arguments A and B must either be square matrices or vectors. This function supports setting the diagonal of a matrix to the values of a vector, copying the diagonal of one matrix to the diagonal of another, or copying the diagonal elements of a matrix to a vector.

briefdescription.para: C = A + diag(b).
A += diag(b).
Multiply a vector by a scalar z = αx.
Multiply a vector by a scalar x = αx.
Compute the Hadamard (elementwise) product of two vectors z = x ⊙ y.
Compute the Hadamard (elementwise) product of two vectors x = x ⊙ y.
Elementwise clamping z = max(lo, min(x, hi)).
Elementwise clamping residual z = x - max(lo, min(x, hi)).

memberdef.argsstring: (Vx &&x, simdified_simd_t< Vx > lo, simdified_simd_t< Vx > hi, Vz &&z)
memberdef.name: clamp

briefdescription.para: Elementwise clamping z = max(lo, min(x, hi)), with scalar lo and hi.

memberdef.argsstring: (Ta alpha, Vx &&x, Tb beta, Vy &&y, Vz &&z)
memberdef.name: axpby

briefdescription.para: Add scaled vector z = αx + βy.
Add scaled vector y = αx + βy.

memberdef.argsstring: (Vy &&y, const std::array< simdified_simd_t< Vy >, sizeof...(Vx)> &alphas, Vx &&...x)
memberdef.name: axpy

briefdescription.para: Add scaled vector y = ∑ᵢ αᵢxᵢ + βy.
Add scaled vector z = αx + y.
Add scaled vector y = αx + βy (where β is a compile-time constant).
Negate a matrix or vector B = -A.
Negate a matrix or vector A = -A.
Subtract two matrices or vectors C = A - B. Rotate affects B.
Subtract two matrices or vectors A = A - B. Rotate affects B.
Add two matrices or vectors C = A + B. Rotate affects B.
Add two matrices or vectors A = A + B. Rotate affects B.
Apply a function to all elements of the given matrices or vectors.
Apply a function to all elements of the given matrices or vectors, storing the result in the first argument.
Apply a function to all elements of the given matrices or vectors, storing the results in the first two arguments.
Apply a function to all elements of the given matrices or vectors, storing the results in the tuple of matrices given as the first argument.

sectiondef.header: Multiplication of batches of matrices with diagonal scaling

briefdescription.para: D = A diag(d) B.

memberdef.argsstring: (VA &&A, VB &&B, VC &&C, VD &&D, Vd &&d, Opts... opts)
memberdef.name: gemm_diag_add

briefdescription.para: D = C + A diag(d) B.
D += A diag(d) B.

memberdef.argsstring: (VA &&A, VB &&B, VC &&C, VD &&D, Vd &&d, Opts... opts)
memberdef.name: gemm_diag_sub

briefdescription.para: D = C - A diag(d) B.
D -= A diag(d) B.

memberdef.argsstring: (VA &&A, Structured< VD, SC > D, Vd &&d, Opts... opts)
memberdef.name: syrk_diag

briefdescription.para: D = A diag(d) Aᵀ with D symmetric.

memberdef.argsstring: (VA &&A, Structured< VC, SC > C, Structured< VD, SC > D, Vd &&d, Opts... opts)
memberdef.name: syrk_diag_add

briefdescription.para: D = C + A diag(d) Aᵀ with C, D symmetric.

memberdef.argsstring: (VA &&A, Structured< VD, SC > D, Vd &&d, Opts... opts)
memberdef.name: syrk_diag_add

briefdescription.para: D += A diag(d) Aᵀ with D symmetric.

memberdef.argsstring: (VA &&A, Structured< VC, SC > C, Structured< VD, SC > D, Vd &&d, Opts... opts)
memberdef.name: syrk_diag_sub

briefdescription.para: D = C - A diag(d) Aᵀ with C, D symmetric.

memberdef.argsstring: (VA &&A, Structured< VD, SC > D, Vd &&d, Opts... opts)
memberdef.name: syrk_diag_sub

briefdescription.para: D -= A diag(d) Aᵀ with D symmetric.

sectiondef.header: Multiplication of batches of general matrices

memberdef.argsstring: (VA &&A, VB &&B, VD &&D, TilingOptions packing={}, Opts... opts)
memberdef.name: gemm

briefdescription.para: D = A B.

memberdef.argsstring: (VA &&A, VB &&B, VD &&D, TilingOptions packing={}, Opts... opts)
memberdef.name: gemm_neg

briefdescription.para: D = -A B.

memberdef.argsstring: (VA &&A, VB &&B, VC &&C, VD &&D, TilingOptions packing={}, Opts... opts)
memberdef.name: gemm_add

briefdescription.para: D = C + A B.

memberdef.argsstring: (VA &&A, VB &&B, VD &&D, TilingOptions packing={}, Opts... opts)
memberdef.name: gemm_add

briefdescription.para: D += A B.

memberdef.argsstring: (VA &&A, VB &&B, VC &&C, VD &&D, TilingOptions packing={}, Opts... opts)
memberdef.name: gemm_sub

briefdescription.para: D = C - A B.

memberdef.argsstring: (VA &&A, VB &&B, VD &&D, TilingOptions packing={}, Opts... opts)
memberdef.name: gemm_sub

briefdescription.para: D -= A B.

sectiondef.header: Multiplication of batches of matrices with symmetric results

memberdef.argsstring: (Structured< VA, SA > A, Structured< VD, SD > D, Opts... opts)
memberdef.name: syrk

briefdescription.para: D = A Aᵀ with D symmetric.

memberdef.argsstring: (TA &&A, Structured< VD, SD > D, Opts... opts)
memberdef.name: syrk

briefdescription.para: D = A Aᵀ with D symmetric.
D = D Dᵀ with D triangular on input and symmetric on output.

memberdef.argsstring: (Structured< VA, SA > A, Structured< VD, SD > D, Opts... opts)
memberdef.name: syrk_neg

briefdescription.para: D = -A Aᵀ with D symmetric.

memberdef.argsstring: (TA &&A, Structured< VD, SD > D, Opts... opts)
memberdef.name: syrk_neg

briefdescription.para: D = A Aᵀ with D symmetric.
D = -D Dᵀ with D triangular on input and symmetric on output.

memberdef.argsstring: (VA &&A, Structured< VC, SD > C, Structured< VD, SD > D, Opts... opts)
memberdef.name: syrk_add

briefdescription.para: D = C + A Aᵀ with C, D symmetric.

memberdef.argsstring: (VA &&A, Structured< VD, SD > D, Opts... opts)
memberdef.name: syrk_add

briefdescription.para: D += A Aᵀ with D symmetric.

memberdef.argsstring: (VA &&A, Structured< VC, SD > C, Structured< VD, SD > D, Opts... opts)
memberdef.name: syrk_sub

briefdescription.para: D = C - A Aᵀ with C, D symmetric.

memberdef.argsstring: (VA &&A, Structured< VD, SD > D, Opts... opts)
memberdef.name: syrk_sub

briefdescription.para: D -= A Aᵀ with D symmetric.

sectiondef.header: Multiplication of batches of triangular matrices

memberdef.argsstring: (Structured< VA, SA > A, Structured< VB, SB > B, Structured< VD, SD > D, Opts... opts)
memberdef.name: trmm

briefdescription.para: D = A B with A and/or B triangular.
D = A B with A and/or B triangular.

memberdef.argsstring: (Structured< VA, SA > A, VD &&D, Opts... opts)
memberdef.name: trmm

briefdescription.para: D = A D with A triangular.

memberdef.argsstring: (VD &&D, Structured< VB, SB > B, Opts... opts)
memberdef.name: trmm

briefdescription.para: D = D B with B triangular.

memberdef.argsstring: (Structured< VA, SA > A, Structured< VB, SB > B, Structured< VD, SD > D, Opts... opts)
memberdef.name: trmm_neg

briefdescription.para: D = -A B with A and/or B triangular.
D = -A B with A and/or B triangular.

memberdef.argsstring: (Structured< VA, SA > A, Structured< VB, SB > B, Structured< VC, SD > C, Structured< VD, SD > D, Opts... opts)
memberdef.name: trmm_add

briefdescription.para: D = C + A B with A and/or B triangular.
D = C + A B with A and/or B triangular.

memberdef.argsstring: (Structured< VA, SA > A, Structured< VB, SB > B, Structured< VC, SD > C, Structured< VD, SD > D, Opts... opts)
memberdef.name: trmm_sub

briefdescription.para: D = C - A B with A and/or B triangular.
D = C - A B with A and/or B triangular.

sectiondef.header: Matrix-vector multiplication of batches of matrices

briefdescription.para: d = A b
d = -A b
d = c + A b
d = d + A b
d = c - A b
d = d - A b
Update Cholesky factor L using low-rank term A diag(d) Aᵀ.

memberdef.argsstring: (Structured< VL, SL > L, VA &&A, Vd &&d, VW &&W)
memberdef.name: hyhound_diag

briefdescription.para: Update Cholesky factor L using low-rank term A diag(d) Aᵀ, with full Householder representation.
Get the size of the storage for the matrix W returned by hyhound_diag(Structured<VL,SL>, VA&&, Vd&&, VW&&).

memberdef.argsstring: (VL &&L, VA &&A, VD &&D, VB &&B, Vd &&d, VW &&W, index_t kA_in_offset=0)
memberdef.name: hyhound_diag_apply

briefdescription.para: Apply Householder transformation generated by hyhound_diag, computing (L̃, D) = (L, A) Q̆.

parameterdescription.para: Part of the Cholesky factor to be updated (rectangular). Overwritten by L̃.
Householder reflector vectors returned by hyhound_diag.
If A is smaller than D, A is implicitly padded with zero columns: the offset of the nonzero part of A in the padded matrix can be specified using kA_in_offset.

briefdescription.para: Apply Householder transformation generated by hyhound_diag, computing (L̃, Ã) = (L, A) Q̆.

parameterdescription.para: Part of the Cholesky factor to be updated (rectangular). Overwritten by L̃.
Householder reflector vectors returned by hyhound_diag.

briefdescription.para: Update Cholesky factor L using low-rank term A diag(copysign(1, d)) Aᵀ, where d contains only ±0 values.

memberdef.argsstring: (Structured< VL1, SL > L1, VA1 &&A1, VL2 &&L2, VA2 &&A2, Vd &&d)
memberdef.name: hyhound_diag_2

briefdescription.para: Update Cholesky factor L using low-rank term A diag(d) Aᵀ, where L and A are stored as two separate block rows.

para.formula: \[ L = \begin{pmatrix} L_{11} \\ L_{21} \end{pmatrix}, \quad A = \begin{pmatrix} A_{1} \\ A_{2} \end{pmatrix}. \]

memberdef.argsstring: (Structured< VL11, SL > L11, VA1 &&A1, VL21 &&L21, VA2 &&A22, VA2o &&A2_out, VU &&L31, VA3 &&A31, VA3o &&A3_out, Vd &&d)
memberdef.name: hyhound_diag_cyclic

briefdescription.para: Update structured Cholesky factor L using structured low-rank term A diag(d) Aᵀ,.

para.formula: \[ L = \begin{pmatrix} L_{11} \\ L_{21} \\ L_{31} \end{pmatrix}, \quad A = \begin{pmatrix} A_{11} & A_{12} \\ 0 & A_{22} \\ A_{31} & 0 \end{pmatrix}, \quad \tilde A = \begin{pmatrix} 0 \\ \tilde A_{2} \\ \tilde A_{3} \end{pmatrix}. \]

memberdef.argsstring: (Structured< VL11, SL > L11, VA1 &&A1, VL21 &&L21, VA2 &&A2, VA2o &&A2_out, VLu1 &&Lu1, VAuo &&Au_out, Vd &&d, bool shift_A_out=false)
memberdef.name: hyhound_diag_riccati

briefdescription.para: Update structured Cholesky factor L using structured low-rank term A diag(d) Aᵀ,.

detaileddescription.para: \[ L = \begin{pmatrix} L_{11} \\ L_{21} \\ L_{u} \end{pmatrix}, \quad A = \begin{pmatrix} A_{1} \\ A_{2} \\ 0 \end{pmatrix}, \quad \tilde A = \begin{pmatrix} 0 \\ \tilde A_{2} \\ \tilde A_{u} \end{pmatrix}. \] The shift_A_out parameter indicates whether the output matrix A2_out should be shifted along the batch dimension. This is used in the Cyqlone solver.

sectiondef.header: Cholesky factorization of batches of matrices

memberdef.argsstring: (VA &&A, Structured< VC, SC > C, Structured< VD, SC > D, simdified_value_t< VA > regularization=0)
memberdef.name: syrk_add_potrf

briefdescription.para: D = chol(C + AAᵀ) with C symmetric, D triangular.
D = chol(D + AAᵀ) with D symmetric/triangular.

memberdef.argsstring: (VA &&A, Structured< VC, SC > C, Structured< VD, SC > D, simdified_value_t< VA > regularization=0)
memberdef.name: syrk_sub_potrf

briefdescription.para: D = chol(C - AAᵀ) with C symmetric, D triangular.

memberdef.argsstring: (VA &&A, Structured< VD, SC > D, simdified_value_t< VA > regularization=0)
memberdef.name: syrk_sub_potrf

briefdescription.para: D = chol(D - AAᵀ) with D symmetric/triangular.

memberdef.argsstring: (VA &&A, Structured< VC, SC > C, Structured< VD, SC > D, Vd &&d, simdified_value_t< VA > regularization=0)
memberdef.name: syrk_diag_add_potrf

briefdescription.para: D = chol(C + A diag(d) Aᵀ) with C symmetric, D triangular.
D = chol(D + A diag(d) Aᵀ) with D symmetric/triangular.

memberdef.argsstring: (Structured< VC, SC > C, Structured< VD, SC > D, simdified_value_t< VC > regularization=0)
memberdef.name: potrf

briefdescription.para: D = chol(C) with C symmetric, D triangular.

memberdef.argsstring: (Structured< VD, SD > D, simdified_value_t< VD > regularization=0)
memberdef.name: potrf

briefdescription.para: D = chol(D) with D symmetric/triangular.

memberdef.definition: norms< simdified_value_t< Vx >, simdified_simd_t< Vx > >::result_simd batmat::linalg::vnorms_all
memberdef.name: vnorms_all

briefdescription.para: Compute the lane-wise norms (max, 1-norm, and 2-norm) of a batch of vectors.
Compute the norms (max, 1-norm, and 2-norm) of a vector.
Compute the lane-wise infinity norms of a batch of vectors.
Compute the infinity norm of a vector.
Compute the lane-wise 1-norms of a batch of vectors.
Compute the 1-norm of a vector.
Compute the lane-wise squared 2-norms of a batch of vectors.
Compute the squared 2-norm of a vector.
Compute the lane-wise 2-norms of a batch of vectors.
Compute the 2-norm of a vector.
Compute the lane-wise dot products of two batches of vectors.
Compute the dot product of two vectors.
∑ wᵢ aᵢ² (lane-wise).
∑ wᵢ aᵢ².
∑ wᵢ(aᵢ - bᵢ)² (lane-wise).
∑ wᵢ(aᵢ - bᵢ)².
Compute the norms (max, 1-norm, and 2-norm) of a vector.
Compute the infinity norm of a vector.
Compute the 1-norm of a vector.
Compute the squared 2-norm of a vector.
Compute the 2-norm of a vector.
Compute the dot product of two vectors.
∑ wᵢ xᵢ².
∑ wᵢ(xᵢ - yᵢ)².

memberdef.definition: norms< simdified_value_t< Vx >, simdified_simd_t< Vx > >::result_simd batmat::linalg::multi::vnorms_all
memberdef.name: vnorms_all

briefdescription.para: Compute the lane-wise norms (max, 1-norm, and 2-norm) of a batch of vectors.
Compute the lane-wise infinity norms of a batch of vectors.
Compute the lane-wise 1-norms of a batch of vectors.
Compute the lane-wise squared 2-norms of a batch of vectors.
Compute the lane-wise 2-norms of a batch of vectors.
Compute the lane-wise dot products of two batches of vectors.
∑ wᵢ xᵢ² (lane-wise).
∑ wᵢ(xᵢ - yᵢ)² (lane-wise).

sectiondef.header: Symmetric multiplication of batches of matrices

memberdef.argsstring: (Structured< VA, SA > A, VB &&B, VC &&C, VD &&D)
memberdef.name: symm_add

briefdescription.para: D = C + A B with A symmetric.
D = D + A B with A symmetric.

sectiondef.header: Symmetric matrix-vector multiplication of batches of matrices

briefdescription.para: d = A b where A is symmetric
d = -A b where A is symmetric

memberdef.argsstring: (Structured< VA, SA > A, VB &&B, VC &&C, VD &&D)
memberdef.name: symv_add

briefdescription.para: d = c + A b where A is symmetric
d = d + A b where A is symmetric

memberdef.argsstring: (Structured< VA, SA > A, VB &&B, VC &&C, VD &&D)
memberdef.name: symv_sub

briefdescription.para: d = c - A b where A is symmetric
d = d - A b where A is symmetric

sectiondef.header: Symmetric matrix-vector multiplication of a block tridiagonal matrix
Triangular views of batches of matrices

briefdescription.para: Lower-triangular view.
Upper-triangular view.
View with the given structure.

sectiondef.header: Triangular solve of batches of matrices

memberdef.argsstring: (Structured< VA, SA > A, VB &&B, VD &&D, with_rotate_B_t< RotB >={})
memberdef.name: trsm

briefdescription.para: D = A⁻¹ B with A triangular.

memberdef.argsstring: (Structured< VA, SA > A, VD &&D, with_rotate_B_t< RotB > shift={})
memberdef.name: trsm

briefdescription.para: D = A⁻¹ D with A triangular.

memberdef.argsstring: (VA &&A, Structured< VB, SB > B, VD &&D, with_rotate_A_t< RotA >={})
memberdef.name: trsm

briefdescription.para: D = A B⁻¹ with B triangular.

memberdef.argsstring: (VD &&D, Structured< VB, SB > B, with_rotate_A_t< RotA > shift={})
memberdef.name: trsm

briefdescription.para: D = D B⁻¹ with B triangular.

sectiondef.header: Triangular inversion of batches of matrices

memberdef.argsstring: (Structured< VA, MatrixStructure::LowerTriangular > A, Structured< VD, MatrixStructure::LowerTriangular > D)
memberdef.name: trtri

briefdescription.para: D = A⁻¹ with A, D lower triangular.

memberdef.argsstring: (Structured< VA, MatrixStructure::UpperTriangular > A, Structured< VD, MatrixStructure::UpperTriangular > D)
memberdef.name: trtri

briefdescription.para: D = A⁻¹ with A, D upper triangular.
D = D⁻¹ with D lower triangular.
D = D⁻¹ with D upper triangular.
Access the original matrices directly in the micro-kernels.
Always pack the blocks of the matrix in a contiguous workspace.
Pack the blocks of the matrix only if it is not in the optimal storage order.
Decides which matrices to pack during large matrix-matrix multiplication.
Batched linear algebra operations.
